message:
fix(http): drop caller-supplied Transfer-Encoding header and improve panic messages in OpenAI tests

HTTP client (src/http/client.rs):
Filter out caller-supplied Transfer-Encoding headers in
build_request_bytes() since this client only emits fixed-length
request bodies — a caller-supplied chunked encoding would lie about
the wire format. Add regression test verifying the header is dropped
and Content-Length is emitted instead.

OpenAI provider (src/providers/openai.rs):
Replace two bare panic!() calls in SSE streaming tests with
panic!("read error: {err}") for clearer failure diagnostics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
